name: 禁忌關係鉤子
description: 父母再婚使男女主成為繼兄妹，將已建立好感的兩人推入倫理禁區，觀眾既期待又焦慮他們如何突破這層障礙。

examples.drama_title: 💗No One Dared Kiss the Bully CEO—Until a Rural Girl Did,Then He Can’t Stop Spoiling Her!#drama #ceo
examples.excerpt: We're going to be step siblings, aren't we? / Siblings. It sounds even more exciting. / There shouldn't be any romance between us. / Really? If Nate finds out we don't get along well, that won't be good for you either. Andy, we're on the same boat now.
